rows.label: qev086601_MSG0001
rows.name: We have visitor![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086601_MSG0002
rows.name:
Hey, you busy? Monty's team botched a
job and we need a cleanup crew, pronto.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086601_MSG0003
rows.name: Monty? So it's a Testamenter mission?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086601_MSG0004
rows.name: Did we find a chunk of White Whale?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086601_MSG0005
rows.name: Chunks, plural.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086601_MSG0006
rows.name:
Bits and pieces have been
washing up around here lately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086601_MSG0007
rows.name: Someone needs to go round 'em all up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086601_JNK0010
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev086601_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask why they're collecting random parts.

rows.label: qev086601_JNK0020
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev086601_SEL0012
rows.name: Express concern about Monty's team.

rows.label: qev086601_MSG0008
rows.name:
The lab boys can analyze 'em, figure out
what part of the ship they're from.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086601_MSG0009
rows.name:
And who knows? With any luck,
they could point us in the
direction of the Lifepoint.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086601_MSG0010
rows.name: Hmm? Oh, yeah. Those guys are fine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086601_MSG0011
rows.name:
They lost some gear, but
otherwise no big deal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086601_MSG0012
rows.name:
Hey, maybe we'll even find some
materials we still haven't been
able to synthesize in NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086601_MSG0013
rows.name:
Yeah, the Testament are
all fired up, too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086601_MSG0014
rows.name:
Just remember, the area hasn't
been cleared of indigens yet—
it could be dangerous.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086601_MSG0015
rows.name:
For an inexperienced team, at least. Which
is why you came to us...am I right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086601_MSG0016
rows.name:
Bingo. I am asking a few other
top teams, so if you want the
job, you'd best shake a leg.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086601_MSG0017
rows.name:
Tatsu not let anyone steal this
glory! Team Tatsu, move out![ST:wait ]
